title: The 48 Laws of Power
author: Robert Greene
action: Record: Information leakage reduces your leverage; strategic silence forces others to reveal their intent while your own remains obscured.

title: Leviathan
author: Thomas Hobbes
content: “Covenants, without the sword, are but words and of no strength to secure a man at all.”
action: Record: Abstract agreements hold no weight without a mechanism for enforcement; always build systems with clear consequences for non-compliance.

title: The Crowd: A Study of the Popular Mind
author: Gustave Le Bon
content: “The masses have never thirsted after truth. They turn aside from evidence that is not to their taste.”
action: Record: Do not attempt to manage large groups with logic; appeal to the psychological undercurrents that actually drive collective behavior.

title: The Dictator's Handbook
author: Bueno de Mesquita & Smith
content: “Political survival depends on keeping a small coalition of essential supporters satisfied.”
action: Record: In any system, identify the critical nodes whose support is necessary for stability; focus your resource allocation exclusively on them.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
author: Mark Manson
content: “Maturity is what happens when one learns to only give a f*ck about what's truly f*ck-worthy.”
action: Record: Power is the result of extreme prioritization; discard all variables that do not contribute to your core objective.
